Functions for initializing the display, showing boot splash, error codes, and firmware update progress.

# Purpose
This C header file declares functions for managing display operations, likely for an embedded system such as a watch. The function [`display_init`](<#display_init>) initializes the display hardware or software. [`display_boot_splash`](<#display_boot_splash>) shows a splash screen during the boot process. The function [`display_error_code`](<#display_error_code>) displays an error code, which is passed as a `uint32_t` argument. [`display_prepare_for_reset`](<#display_prepare_for_reset>) is intended to prevent visual artifacts when the system resets. Finally, [`display_firmware_update_progress`](<#display_firmware_update_progress>) shows the progress of a firmware update, using a rational number represented by a numerator and denominator to indicate completion status.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdint.h`
